raw_title: Survival in the Passion Economy: Mental Health and Well-Being of Local Journalism Entrepreneurs
title_en: Survival in the Passion Economy: Mental Health and Well-Being of Local Journalism Entrepreneurs
title_zh: 激情经济中的生存：地方新闻创业者的心理健康与福祉
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在激情经济背景下，地方新闻创业者如何维持心理健康和福祉。激情经济指的是人们基于个人热情和兴趣开展工作的经济模式。研究关注这些创业者面临的挑战，以及他们如何应对压力、保持工作与生活的平衡，从而在竞争激烈的环境中生存和发展。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how local journalism entrepreneurs maintain their mental health and well-being in the context of the passion economy. The passion economy refers to an economic model where people work based on personal passions and interests. The research focuses on the challenges these entrepreneurs face, how they cope with stress, balance work and life, and survive and thrive in a competitive environment.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注新闻创业与心理健康交叉领域，探讨在数字媒体时代，地方新闻创业者如何应对经济压力、职业倦怠和社会责任，以促进可持续的新闻生态系统。
research_direction_en: The research direction focuses on the intersection of journalism entrepreneurship and mental health, examining how local journalism entrepreneurs navigate economic pressures, burnout, and social responsibilities in the digital media era to foster a sustainable news ecosystem.
